prompt: Create a Remotion energy grid load-balancing dashboard with a dark background, an animated demand curve, three substation status chips, and a reserve-margin badge.
Create a Remotion DevOps incident timeline with four stages: detect, triage, mitigate, monitor. Show each stage as a compact card with status chips and an animated resolution progress bar.
Create a Remotion edtech concept map showing six knowledge nodes connected by prerequisite links. Animate a learning path from foundations to mastery and include a mastery score badge.
Create a Remotion hiring funnel dashboard with five pipeline stages, horizontal bars, conversion percentages, and a highlighted bottleneck callout.
Create a Remotion ecommerce checkout-flow analysis with four step cards, drop-off percentages, a small SVG trend line, and a recovery opportunity badge.
Create a Remotion robotics warehouse route visualization with shelf blocks, an animated robot path, four waypoint labels, and a task completion meter.
Create a Remotion academic citation network with five paper nodes, directed citation links, year labels, and an influence score panel.
Create a Remotion sports performance radar for one athlete with six metric spokes, an animated filled polygon, compact stat chips, and a training-load warning.
